subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Taqi! We have risen this day in the prison of 'Akká, encompassed by sorrows from them that have denied Our signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل تقی اصبحنا الیوم فی سجن عکآء و احاطتنا الاحزان من الذین انکروا ایاتنا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
